response.justification: Wei is a highly experienced software engineer with a strong background in full-stack web development, DLang, and testing methodologies. However, the candidate falls significantly short of the minimum requirement of 8 years of C++ programming, possessing less than a year of professional C++ experience. Furthermore, while Wei has experience with microservices and cloud deployments, their background lacks the deep, low-level infrastructure and compute platform engineering experience necessary for leading an internal cloud compute platform team.
strengths: Extensive overall software engineering experience with a strong focus on software craftsmanship, testing (TDD, CI/CD), and best practices.
Proven ability to mentor and share knowledge, evidenced by organizing workshops, testing courses, and holding Staff-level positions.
Entrepreneurial and self-driven, demonstrated by founding and maintaining an open-source, event-driven Geo-Data platform (GISCollective).
concerns: Severely lacks the minimum required 8 years of C++ programming experience, with less than one year of professional C++ work listed.
Experience is heavily skewed towards full-stack web development (Node.js, TypeScript, UI frameworks) rather than low-level compute infrastructure.
Lacks substantial experience building or leading the technical strategy specifically for large-scale, internal cloud compute platforms.
